hero.description: ShopStarter gives you the technology infrastructure to professionalize order management. Showcase your catalog to neighbors in a clean, organized, and free manner.

slogan.main:
With love and effort
we will earn our lunch.
slogan.philosophy: Our philosophy is your growth. We understand local effort and sacrifice. ShopStarter is your ally to bring order and digital dignity to the fruit of your work.

testimonials.section_desc: Made by and for everyday fighters.

reviews.name: Doña Nubia
reviews.text: This is a blessing. I used to write down orders in an old notebook. Now, they arrive on my cell phone, I organize my puddings, and the customer comes to pick them up. No mess.

reviews.name: Carlos Vargas
reviews.text: Seeing my location on the map, the people in my neighborhood realized my route and order their milk directly. I connect easily and they pay me on delivery!

reviews.name: Familia Giraldo
reviews.text: We feel big. We have our own visual catalog, arrange delivery, and everything is clearly recorded to prepare the parcels on time.

questions.q: Do you manage the money or charge a commission?
questions.a: No! ShopStarter is a purely organizational and logistics platform. We do not touch your money, nor charge sales percentages. Your customers pay you directly by the means you and they arrange (cash on delivery, bank transfer, neighborly, etc).

questions.q: What benefits do I get by registering?
questions.a: Your business will appear on our hyperlocal map, you’ll have a visual catalog, and receive a clear notification whenever someone places an order. Strict order on your cell phone instead of chaotic notebooks!

questions.q: Do I need to be a formal or big company?
questions.a: Not at all. ShopStarter is designed to help everyone: from corner arepa sellers to budding formal entrepreneurs. We believe in honest work and give you a professional showcase without absurd paperwork.

questions.q: Do my customers need to download a complex app?
questions.a: No. Your customers can view your store on the public web using any browser very quickly. They choose what they want, place the order, and you get notified.

features.title:
Designed to bring
order and dignity

list.title: Visual Catalog
list.desc: Show your products with brilliant photos and descriptions without worrying about transactional surcharges.

list.title: GPS and Geolocation
list.desc: Your local store is visible on the map. Your neighbors and passersby will find you easily.

list.title: Order Management
list.desc: Approve and monitor orders in real time. Zero chaos on paper sheets, total digital organization.

list.title: Visualization AI
list.desc: Suggestions supported by Artificial Intelligence to help you present better titles in your products.

list.title: Civic Directory
list.desc: Secure accounts for you and quick access for your customers. Keep your customers informed about your stock.

list.title: Freedom of Payment
list.desc: Arrange with your customer: whether they pay in cash, bank transfer or on site. We just connect needs.

howItWorks.title:
Digitize your processes
in Minutes
howItWorks.desc: We understand you don’t have time to waste. Registering your business just takes a few steps.

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.desc: Secure your free community account in just a few clicks.

steps.title: Your Showcase
steps.desc: Upload photos of your best products visually.

steps.title: Local Expansion
steps.desc: You are shown on the neighborhood map and neighbors will know you’re there.

steps.title: Total Control
steps.desc: Direct notifications whenever someone requests something. Approve, deliver, and maintain your digital order.

cta.title:
Simplify your life.
Organize your business.
cta.desc: Don’t let orders get lost in loose sheets. Join the platform that dignifies your effort.
